CustomField.description: Number of days from the Billing Launch Date Stamp to the Billing Setup Threshold Met Stamp field. (Billing_Setup_Threshold_Met_Stamp__c - Billing_Launch_Date_Stamp__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days from the Billing Launch Date Stamp to the Billing Setup Threshold Met Stamp field.
CustomField.label: Days Billing CW to Billing Setup Stamp
